visual_style: clean, bright, realistic campus and study atmosphere

shot_list.visual_plan: Fast shots of laptop keyboard, code editor, and campus walkway.
Show department name as text overlay with classroom or campus background.
Show programming screen, notebook, simple AI/data/system keywords as text overlays.
Show group discussion from behind or hands only, whiteboard, project demo screen.
asset_needed: consented group shot or non-identifiable hands-only shot

shot_list.visual_plan: Show quiet study scene, hallway, campus life, or classroom materials.
Closing title with department name and slogan.

copyright_policy: Use self-made footage, self-made slides, system fonts, and no copyrighted music unless openly licensed.
privacy_policy: Avoid close-up faces unless written consent is obtained.
